steps.t: Theodore Gorse is in the small settlement of Avardin, on the western side of Dunland. Bingo has asked you to see what Theodore thinks about beginning …
Bingo is down the hill west of the eastern entrance to Galtrev. Bingo has agreed to meet you and his other companions in Galtrev, the large settlement…
Haley Meadowsweet is down the hill west of the eastern entrance to Galtrev. Theodore seems to be missing, and Bingo wants to know if Haley knows where…
Theodore Gorse is missing, and Haley Meadowsweet wants you to search various locations in Galtrev for her absent student.
Haley Meadowsweet is down the hill to the west of the eastern entrance to Galtrev. You were unable to find Theodore in Galtrev, and should return to H…
Humfrey Rumming is on the hill west of the eastern gate of Galtrev. Theodore is missing, and so is the Rothstone. Does Humfrey Rumming know something …
Bingo is down the hill west of the eastern entrance to Galtrev. Theodore has apparently gone to a place of great danger with the Rothstone, and Bingo …
Theodore Gorse is outside the settlement of Lhanuch, in Enedwaith.
Haley Meadowsweet is outside the settlement of Lhanuch, in Enedwaith.
Bingo Boffin is outside the settlement of Lhanuch, in Enedwaith.
